sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27925" key="dolixo/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολῐχόφρων</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n27925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">far-reaching,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέριμναι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:11:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
